case_title: GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP VS. PHILLIP GOALWIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-03-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-14-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60665661)EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT GOALWIN, PHILLIP GOALWIN, DEBBIE ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERING, CONSULTING & REMEDIATION, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-03-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-10-2017

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-14-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-25-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
